summary: Complete testing of Demo Section and WhatsApp Button features across Spanish and English pages - ALL 11 TESTS PASSED. Demo section with credentials visible on all pages, WhatsApp button properly positioned above chat widget, hero prices correctly show $195/year.

test_results.1_demo_section_spanish_homepage: PASS - Demo section visible with title 'Prueba FabriControl Ahora Mismo', credentials displayed, 'Entrar a la Demo Web' button links to https://fabricontrol-1.emergent.host/
test_results.2_demo_section_spanish_pricing: PASS - Compact version visible with '¿Quieres ver el sistema antes de decidir?', credentials displayed, 'Probar Demo Ahora' button works
test_results.3_demo_nav_button_spanish: PASS - 🎮 Demo button visible in navigation header with accent background, links to demo
test_results.4_whatsapp_spanish_homepage: PASS - Green WhatsApp floating button visible at bottom:10rem (above chat widget at ~90px), data-testid='whatsapp-float-btn'
test_results.5_whatsapp_correct_number: PASS - WhatsApp button links to https://wa.me/972526489461 (correct number +972526489461)
test_results.6_demo_section_english_homepage: PASS - Demo section visible with title 'Try FabriControl Right Now', credentials displayed, 'Enter Web Demo' button works
test_results.7_demo_section_english_pricing: PASS - Compact version visible with 'Want to see the system before deciding?', credentials displayed, 'Try Demo Now' button works
test_results.8_demo_nav_button_english: PASS - 🎮 Demo button visible in English navigation menu
test_results.9_whatsapp_english_static_pages: PASS - WhatsApp button injected via chat-widget.js on /en/index.html and /en/pricing.html

context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo section and WhatsApp button features verified on all Spanish/English pages. WhatsApp React component at /app/frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.js (bottom: 10rem). Chat widget injects WhatsApp for static pages via /app/frontend/public/assets/js/chat-widget.js. Both buttons properly positioned - no overlap.
